name: Advanced Micro Devices
confidenceReason: Targeting >35% CAGR through 2028 with MI450 ramp and data center expansion.
bullCase: The only viable merchant silicon alternative to NVIDIA. EPYC server CPUs are taking massive share from Intel, while MI450 offers a strong AI GPU roadmap.
bearCase: Highly cyclical end markets (PC, gaming) can drag down data center outperformance. Remains a distant second to NVIDIA in AI software ecosystem (CUDA).
